The attack mechanism and impact of the AI threat research text can be summarized as follows:

**Attack Mechanism:**

The research highlights the convergence of Artificial Intelligence (AI) and Internet of Things (IoT) in cybersecurity, which introduces new challenges and threats. Cybercriminals target the vast and often unsecured data generated by IoT devices, exploiting weak access controls, outdated software, and inadequate encryption.
